properties.why: inside MPA: Galápagos Marine Reserve · not broadcasting AIS (dark vessel) · GFW fishing-score: 0.92 · length: 48 m (industrial)
properties.why_full: inside MPA: Galápagos Marine Reserve · not broadcasting AIS (dark vessel) · GFW fishing-score: 0.92 · length: 48 m (industrial)
properties.caveats: Dark vessel: detected by satellite SAR but not broadcasting AIS. | Not SHAP-explainable -- a SAR detection has no movement track to attribute. | length_m and fishing_score are GFW model estimates from imagery, not ground truth. | MPA boundary may be approximate; verify against official WDPA limits. | An inspection lead, not courtroom evidence.
properties.caveat: Dark vessel: detected by satellite SAR but not broadcasting AIS.
